title: Torus
description: Torus: A standard solid circular ring torus, formed as a surface of revolution of a circle about an axis.

Centre.description: Origin point defining location of the Torus in three-dimensional space. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Axis.description: Vector defining the axis of revolution and the orientation of the Torus in three-dimensional space. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

RadiusMajor.description: Distance from the Torus Centre (and the axis of revolution) to the centre of the circular cross section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RadiusMinor.description: The radius defining the size of the circular cross section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
